metadata.description: Default configurations for enemy types - defines material pools and budget modifiers per type

orc.description: Orc warriors - mid-tier materials, slightly better budget

troll.description: Trolls - beast-like materials, higher material percentage

knight.description: Human knights - quality steel and silver equipment

dragon.description: Dragons - legendary material hoarders, 40% material budget

fire_elemental.description: Fire elementals - obsidian and fire-themed materials, heavy material focus

ice_elemental.description: Ice elementals - crystal and frost materials, heavy material focus

undead.description: Undead - rusty materials, low material percentage, more enchantment focus

vampire.description: Vampires - better undead, slightly better materials

demon.description: Demons - dark cursed materials, high budget

angel.description: Angels - divine materials, high budget (using fey pool for celestial-themed materials)

beast.description: Generic beasts - natural materials, lower material focus

cultist.description: Cultists - poor materials, more enchantment focus

giant.description: Giants - large and powerful, good materials
